ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation of the weather station in feet */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment used at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather forecasting model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of weather forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather forecasting model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the weather forecasting model */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the weather forecasting model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather forecasting model used */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather forecast */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time of the weather forecast */,
  "temperature_f" REAL /* Temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "precipitation_in" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "wind_speed_mph" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES weather_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather forecasting model */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES weather_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_observation_station" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id", "station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_station" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather model */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "station_id")
)
